feed.title: Guinea Padre — Children's Books & SEL
feed.subtitle: Social-emotional learning picture books for ages 3-8. The Sun in the Rain & A Fintastic Day at the Aquarium.

entry.title: Ultimate Guide to Ocean Books for Kids
entry.summary: Your comprehensive guide to the best ocean-themed children’s books — from picture books to educational reads for ages 3-8.

entry.summary: The complete guide to rainy day books and indoor activities for kids ages 3-8. Cozy read-alouds, crafts, and SEL moments.

entry.summary: Explore ocean animals through picture books! A learning guide for parents and teachers with SEL connections.

entry.summary: How to raise kids who love the ocean — books, activities, and habits that nurture marine appreciation and empathy.

entry.title: The Sun in the Rain — A Children's Book About Finding Joy
entry.summary: Discover The Sun in the Rain — a gentle SEL picture book about gratitude, resilience, and finding sunshine on rainy days. Ages 3-8.

entry.title: A Fintastic Day at the Aquarium
entry.summary: Dive into A Fintastic Day at the Aquarium — an ocean adventure that teaches kids about emotions, empathy, and marine life. Ages 3-8.

entry.summary: The best mindfulness picture books for kids ages 3-8 — calm-down corner favorites, breathing exercises, and emotional awareness stories.

entry.summary: Preparing for kindergarten? These picture books build social-emotional skills, empathy, and confidence for the first day of school.

entry.title: Screen-Free Reading Activities for Kids 2026
entry.summary: Swap screens for stories! Screen-free reading activities that build emotional intelligence and a love of books.

entry.title: Spring Break Aquarium Guide for Kids 2026
entry.summary: Plan the perfect spring break aquarium trip! Tips, books, and SEL activities to make it enriching for ages 3-8.

entry.title: Children's Books About Anxiety
entry.summary: Gentle picture books about anxiety for kids ages 3-8. Help children name worries, practice calming strategies, and build resilience.

entry.title: Children's Books About Self-Regulation
entry.summary: The best children's books about self-regulation — stories that teach emotional control, breathing, and calm-down strategies.

entry.summary: Gift-worthy picture books for toddlers ages 3-8 — birthdays, holidays, and just-because surprises that spark joy and empathy.

entry.summary: Top picture books for 4-year-olds — stories about feelings, friendship, and discovery that preschoolers ask for again and again.

entry.summary: The best read-aloud picture books for preschool — engaging stories with SEL themes that teachers and parents love.

entry.title: Books to Help Kids with Big Feelings
entry.summary: Picture books that help kids navigate big emotions — anger, sadness, worry — with empathy and practical strategies.

entry.title: Children's Books About Finding Joy
entry.summary: Books that teach children to find joy in everyday moments — gratitude, optimism, and emotional resilience stories.

entry.title: Children's Books About Trying New Things
entry.summary: Encouraging picture books about trying new things — building courage, managing worry, and celebrating growth.

entry.title: Children's Books About Weather
entry.summary: Rain, shine, and storms — picture books that explore weather through an SEL lens. Perfect for curious kids ages 3-8.

entry.summary: The best empathy picture books for children — stories that foster understanding, compassion, and social awareness.

entry.summary: Ocean science meets SEL! Picture books about marine life, ecosystems, and the wonder of underwater discovery.

entry.summary: The best new children's books of 2026 — fresh releases featuring SEL, ocean adventures, and diverse characters.

entry.title: Books About Change for Kids
entry.summary: Children's books about change — helping kids navigate transitions, new situations, and life changes with resilience.

entry.summary: Build emotional resilience through stories! The best picture books that teach kids to bounce back from challenges.

entry.title: Picture Books About Gratitude for Kids
entry.summary: Gratitude picture books that teach children thankfulness, appreciation, and finding joy in everyday moments.
